# Sentinel dVPN SDK

> Decentralized VPN SDK for the Sentinel P2P bandwidth network. Connect to 900+ nodes in 90+ countries with WireGuard + V2Ray tunnels over the Cosmos blockchain. No accounts, no servers, no centralized dependencies. TypeScript types included.

## Quick Start

- [AI Path (zero-config)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sentinel-ai-connect): `await connect({ mnemonic })` — one function call to encrypted tunnel
- [Consumer SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sentinel-dvpn-sdk): `import { connect } from 'sentinel-dvpn-sdk/consumer'` — 63 exports for VPN apps
- [Operator SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sentinel-dvpn-sdk): `import { batchStartSessions } from 'sentinel-dvpn-sdk/operator'` — 57 exports for operators

## Installation

```bash
npm install sentinel-dvpn-sdk    # Full SDK (278 exports)
npm install sentinel-ai-connect  # Zero-config wrapper (20 exports)
```

## Core API (Consumer)

- `connectDirect(opts)` — Connect to specific node, pay per GB
- `connectAuto(opts)` — Auto-select best node with retry
- `connectViaPlan(opts)` — Connect via subscription plan
- `disconnect(state)` — End session, tear down tunnel
- `queryOnlineNodes(opts)` — Fetch and score available nodes
- `createWallet(mnemonic)` — BIP39 wallet from mnemonic
- `getBalance(client, address)` — Query P2P token balance
- `verifyConnection()` — Confirm tunnel works (IP check)
- `enableKillSwitch()` — Block all non-tunnel traffic
- `speedtestDirect(opts)` — Measure tunnel speed

## Connect Options

```typescript
interface ConnectOptions {
  mnemonic: string;        // Required: 12/24-word BIP39 phrase
  nodeAddress?: string;    // Optional: specific sentnode1... address
  country?: string;        // Optional: preferred exit country
  protocol?: 'wireguard' | 'v2ray' | 'auto';
  gigabytes?: number;      // Default: 1
  hours?: number;          // Alternative: pay per hour
  dns?: 'handshake' | 'google' | 'cloudflare';
  fullTunnel?: boolean;    // Default: true
  killSwitch?: boolean;    // Default: false
}
```

## Error Codes (33 typed)

Every error has `.code` (machine-readable), `.details` (structured context), and severity classification (fatal/retryable/recoverable/infrastructure). Use `isRetryable(error)` and `userMessage(error)` helpers.

Fatal: INVALID_MNEMONIC, INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE, INVALID_OPTIONS
Retryable: NODE_OFFLINE, V2RAY_ALL_FAILED, BROADCAST_FAILED, ALL_NODES_FAILED
Recoverable: SESSION_EXISTS, PARTIAL_CONNECTION_FAILED

## Chain Info

- Chain: sentinelhub-2 (Cosmos SDK)
- Token: P2P (denom: udvpn, 1 P2P = 1,000,000 udvpn)
- LCD endpoints: lcd.sentinel.co, api.sentinel.quokkastake.io, sentinel-api.polkachu.com
- v3 paths: /sentinel/node/v3/, /sentinel/session/v3/, /sentinel/plan/v3/

## Examples

- [connect-direct.mjs](./examples/connect-direct.mjs) — Full VPN connection flow
- [query-nodes.mjs](./examples/query-nodes.mjs) — Browse nodes (no wallet needed)
- [wallet-basics.mjs](./examples/wallet-basics.mjs) — Create wallet, check balance
- [connect-plan.mjs](./examples/connect-plan.mjs) — Plan-based connection
- [error-handling.mjs](./examples/error-handling.mjs) — Typed error patterns

## TypeScript

Full type declarations at `types/index.d.ts` (3,828 lines). Import types:
```typescript
import type { ConnectOptions, ConnectResult, ScoredNode } from 'sentinel-dvpn-sdk';
```

## Security

- TOFU TLS cert pinning (like SSH known_hosts)
- AES-256-GCM encrypted credential storage
- Kill switch (OS firewall rules)
- DNS leak prevention
- Private key zeroing after use
- No telemetry, no logging, no accounts
